title: × Calamicromeria hostii
taxonomy: × Calamicromeria hostii is a hybrid orchid species, and its classification is not well-documented. However, based on its parent species, Calanthe and Cremiopsis, it can be classified as a member of the Orchidaceae family. Specifically, × Calamicromeria hostii falls under the subfamily Epidendroideae and tribe Calantheae. This classification suggests a close relationship with other orchids in the same subfamily and tribe. Further research is needed to confirm the exact classification and understand the evolutionary history of × Calamicromeria hostii.
